svg.text: FastAPI · Head Node · Puhti HPC · SQLite · GitHub
Results rsync'd back to NFS on
GET /status/{job_id} every 5 s → queued / running / done / failed
Download stdout, output files, plots via extension
Extension polls status: pending → building → ready
Admin clicks View Log → SSH cat build-name-jobid.out
Appears in dropdown → submit jobs now
All env build requests require explicit
admin approval before Slurm build job.
